articles.author: Abhishek Vishnoi, Andras Gergely
articles.title: Iran War Spurs Emerging Markets Rout, Threatens Investment Case - Bloomberg.com
articles.description: Eastern European assets rebounded, along with stock markets in South Africa and Saudi Arabia, after a report that Iranian officials indirectly reached out to the US in a bid to end the conflict.
articles.content:
